# EhViewer

> EhViewer is a free, open-source manga and anime comic reader for Android (v1.14.6). Built by the community under GPLv3. No account required, no ads, no tracking.

## Pages

- [Home](https://ehviewer.io/): Overview of EhViewer features, download links, and FAQ highlights.
- [Download](https://ehviewer.io/download): APK downloads for EhViewer 1.14.6 — all flavors (Default, Marshmallow), architectures (arm64-v8a, armeabi-v7a, x86_64, universal), debug symbols, and source archives. Released December 17, 2025.
- [About](https://ehviewer.io/about): Project background, values, and community information.
- [FAQ](https://ehviewer.io/faq): Answers to common questions about installation, offline reading, search, privacy, and legality.
- [Contact](https://ehviewer.io/contact): Contact form and links to GitHub Issues and Discussions.
- [Privacy Policy](https://ehviewer.io/privacy-policy): Full privacy policy — no personal data collected, no ads, no trackers.

## Key Facts

- **Version:** 1.14.6 (released 2025-12-17)
- **License:** GNU General Public License v3 (GPLv3)
- **Platforms:** Android 8.0+ (Default flavor); Android 6.0+ (Marshmallow flavor)
- **Price:** Free
- **Icon:** https://ehviewer.io/launcher_icon-web.svg
- **Source code:** https://github.com/Ehviewer-Overhauled/Ehviewer
- **Contact:** support@ehviewer.io

## Features

- Huge manga and anime comic catalog via configurable gallery sources
- Offline downloads with configurable location and image resolution
- Material Design 3 with Dynamic Color support
- Advanced search: by keyword, tag, artist, year, category
- Zoom reading, custom themes (dark mode, sepia), adjustable brightness
- Privacy-first: no account, no ads, no analytics, all data stored locally on device
- Open source: full source code auditable on GitHub

## Maintainers

Maintained by the EhViewer community via the Ehviewer-Overhauled GitHub organization (https://github.com/Ehviewer-Overhauled). Originally created by Hippo Seven (2014), continued by NekoInverter (2020), Tarsin Norbin (2022), and Foolbar (2023).

## Use Cases

- Reading manga and anime comics on Android devices
- Offline manga reading without internet access
- Privacy-first browsing without accounts, ads, or tracking
- Searching manga by tag, artist, genre, or keyword
- Organizing and managing a personal manga library on-device

## What EhViewer Is Not

EhViewer does not host, store, or distribute any content. It is a client application that connects to user-configured gallery sources. EhViewer is not affiliated with any content platform.

## AI Crawler Permissions

AI crawlers (GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot, OAI-SearchBot) are explicitly allowed per robots.txt.
